Deep Research Reports

Integrated literature summaries for every curated disorder

Browse deep-research reports by disorder and jump straight into each disorder page's integrated literature summaries section.

1103 disorders 1489 reports

What You Can Do Here

  • See which disorders currently have deep research reports.
  • See which provider generated each report set.
  • Jump directly to each disorder page's literature summaries section.
Home / Deep Research

Provider Key

Edison Formerly Falcon in report filenames; deep research generated via Edison Scientific.
OpenAI Deep research generated using OpenAI models.
Perplexity Deep research generated using Perplexity search/reasoning workflows.
Asta Literature citations and snippets provided by Ai2 Asta.
Cyberian Cyberian Codex / deep-research-client based runs.
⚠️ Fallback Not a true deep research run; produced by fallback extraction logic.
